name: storybook-auto-composer
description: Storybook bring-up assistant for installing, configuring, mocking, composing stories, adding interactions, generating visual baselines, and validating usable Storybook setups.

interface.shortDescription: Install and complete usable Storybook setups for React and Next.js projects.
interface.longDescription: Storybook bring-up assistant for installing Storybook when missing, configuring React and Next.js App Router projects, wiring Next.js runtime mocks, detecting and connecting MSW API mocks, composing runnable .stories.tsx files, adding play-function interactions, generating screenshot baselines, and validating with build/test/browser checks.
